headline: Textron (NYSE:TXT) Reports Upbeat Q1 CY2026
summary: Aerospace and defense company Textron (NYSE:TXT) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 11.8% year on year to $3.70 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.45 per share was 11.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Textron (NYSE:TXT) Reports Upbeat Q1 CY2026
content.summary: Aerospace and defense company Textron (NYSE:TXT) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 11.8% year on year to $3.70 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.45 per share was 11.2% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Textron Reports First Quarter 2026 Results; Announces Intent to Separate its Industrial Segment
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., April 30, 2026--Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) today reported first quarter 2026 net income of $1.25 per share, compared to $1.13 in the first quarter of 2025. Adjusted net income, a non-GAAP measure that is defined and reconciled to GAAP in an attachment to this release, was $1.45 per share for the first quarter of 2026, compared to $1.28 per share in the first quarter of 2025.

content.title: Textron Reports First Quarter 2026 Results; Announces Intent to Separate its Industrial Segment
content.summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., April 30, 2026--Textron Inc. (NYSE: TXT) today reported first quarter 2026 net income of $1.25 per share, compared to $1.13 in the first quarter of 2025. Adjusted net income, a non-GAAP measure that is defined and reconciled to GAAP in an attachment to this release, was $1.45 per share for the first quarter of 2026, compared to $1.28 per share in the first quarter of 2025.

headline: Textron Announces Intent to Separate its Industrial Segment, Enhancing Strategic Focus as a Pure-Play Aerospace and Defense Company
summary: PROVIDENCE, R.I., April 30, 2026--Textron Inc. (the "Company" or "Textron") (NYSE: TXT) today announced its intent to separate its Industrial segment from the Company’s core aerospace and defense businesses to enhance its strategic and operational focus and drive long-term value for stakeholders.
